full_text:
Kuai Yue (Yidu) 蒯越 (異度)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Kuai Yue (蒯越), styledYidu (異度), was born in Nanyang. Younger brother of Kuai Liang. Became a vassal of Wei when Cao Cao took Jing. Kuai Yue was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Liu Biao, and the Wei Kingdom.
